When the 10~ lord occupies the house it makes the native
slow and steady in everything. The native's mother will be very
shrewd and she will control her family very well. The native will be
very straight forward and he will not be willing to deviate from the
path of righteousness even under extreme contingencies and
circumstances. He will prefer to steady life to use money for pump
and show.
